title: MS / MD Jobs 2026 – Radiologist
shortInfo: District Hospital Balod Recruitment 2026 for 1 post of Radiologist. Candidates with MD/DNB/DMRD Can Apply Online. The last date to apply online is 29-05-2026. The candidate shall apply online through District Hospital Balod official website balod.gov.in.

basic_details.job_title: District Hospital Balod Radiologist Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: District Hospital Balod Recruitment 2026 for 1 post of Radiologist. Candidates with MD/DNB/DMRD Can Apply Online. The last date to apply online is 29-05-2026. The candidate shall apply online through District Hospital Balod official website balod.gov.in.

application_fee.details: Minimum Age: 18 years Maximum Age: 70 years

age_limit.details: Candidates who are interested in applying for the District Hospital Balod Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form.

how_to_apply: Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 29-05-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

faq.question: What is the last date to apply for the District Hospital Balod Radiologist recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email for the Radiologist post is 29 May 2026.

faq.question: What is the salary offered for the Radiologist position?
faq.answer: The selected candidate for the Radiologist position will receive a salary of Rs. 200000 per month.

faq.question: What are the educational qualifications required for the Radiologist post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess an MD/DNB/DMRD in Radiology to be eligible for the Radiologist position.

faq.question: What is the age limit for the Radiologist recruitment?
faq.answer: The age limit for the Radiologist post is between 18 years and 70 years.

faq.question: How can I apply for the District Hospital Balod Radiologist job?
faq.answer: Applications should be submitted via email. Ensure you follow the instructions provided in the official notification.

faq.question: Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category in the official notification for this recruitment.

faq.question: What is the selection process for the Radiologist role?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Radiologist position will be based on a Walk-in Interview.

faq.question: How many vacancies are available for the Radiologist post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the Radiologist post at District Hospital Balod.

faq.question: What is the job type for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The job type for this recruitment is Contractual.

faq.question: Where is the District Hospital Balod located?
faq.answer: District Hospital Balod is located in Balod, Chhattisgarh.
